description: A new user is having trouble with the initial setup of their account and data import.

nodes.task_description: Identify the user and review their account's onboarding checklist status.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sees the user is stuck on the 'Import Data' step.

nodes.task_description: Review the user's import file and identify a formatting error in the date column.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly diagnoses the import problem.

nodes.task_description: Explain the formatting error and provide a link to the knowledge base article with correct import templates.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent helps the user fix their file and successfully complete the import.
